---
title: News
listing:
    - id: news
      contents:
        - news/*.yml
      type: default
      fields: [title, description, date, image]
      max-description-length: 200
      sort: 
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: true
      sort-ui: false
      filter-ui: true
date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
resources: "news/images/*"
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---
